name: Ciri and Karlach (Monster's Monster)
description:
Storm and sun, ice and fire, discipline and chaos.

A Witcher known for her deadly grace and a fiery, battle-hardened tiefling form an unlikely and formidable duo, navigating a world that fears them while forging a bond that transcends their monstrous reputations.

[Art Credit: alicecry]
